Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_JAMMING_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5073 0 0}I'm picking up on a large group of enemies ahead![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_JAMMING_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}Even if you took a detour, it's unlikely you'd be able to avoid them entirely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_JAMMING_03_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}Please wait! It could be dangerous without a plan...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_JAMMING_03_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Um, I appreciate your confidence in me, but I mostly just locate enemies...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_JAMMING_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Hm... Actually, I may be able to help out here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_JAMMING_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}{f 0 1 35}Jamming{f 0 1 27} obstructs enemy detection, making it harder for them to find you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}In other words, enemies shouldn't attack you even if you enter their line of sight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It won't always work on all enemies, but for these ones here...[n]{f 1 1}
